headline: JPMorgan’s Matejka says buy any dip in stocks
summary: Investing.com -- JPMorgan strategist Mislav Matejka urged investors to look past near-term geopolitical turbulence and use market weakness as a buying opportunity, arguing in a note that the risk of a prolonged stagflationary shock is overstated.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Colgate-Palmolive, Raises Price Target to $80
summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $79 to $80.
